# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: myapp-config
data:
  myapp-config.yaml: |
    # Configuration for my application

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapp
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: myapp-container
        image: myapp-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: myapp-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: myapp

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: myapp-ingress
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
spec:
  rules:
  - host: "*"
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: myapp-service
            port:
              number: 80

---
apiVersion: helm.sh/v3
kind: Chart
metadata:
  name: myapp-chart
version: 0.1.0
description: A Helm chart for Kubernetes

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: myapp-namespace
